purpose: WiFi normal/error dataset covering previous false positives and failure cases.

required_rows.input: kernel: wlan0: station 0c:8b:fd:61:c2:14 power save mode disabled
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: kernel: wlan0: station 0c:8b:fd:61:c2:14 power save mode enabled
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 0c:8b:fd:61:c2:14 keepalive response received
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 0c:8b:fd:61:c2:14 accounting session updated rx_bytes=23124 tx_bytes=31242
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: wpa_supplicant: wlan0: CTRL-EVENT-SIGNAL-CHANGE station=0c:8b:fd:61:c2:14 above=1 signal=-61 noise=-95 txrate=144.4 Mb/s
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 3c:22:fb:10:24:38 RSN: PMKSA cache hit
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 3c:22:fb:10:24:38 IEEE 802.11: did not acknowledge keepalive, retry scheduled
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 3c:22:fb:10:24:38 keepalive retry succeeded
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 3c:22:fb:10:24:38 keepalive response received after retry
required_rows.label: normal

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 3c:22:fb:10:24:38 disconnected after repeated keepalive failures
required_rows.label: error

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 3c:22:fb:10:24:38 deauthenticated after keepalive timeout reason=4
required_rows.label: error

required_rows.input: hostapd: wlan0: STA 3c:22:fb:10:24:38 excessive frame retries, disconnecting station
required_rows.label: error

split_strategy: 60% normal / 40% error in both training and validation.
